code: export const getErrorMessage=err=>{if(!err)return'Unknown error';if(typeof err==='string')return err;if(err.message)return err.message;if(err.body&&typeof err.body==='object'){return err.body.message||err.body.details||JSON.stringify(err.body);}return'Request failed';};export const escapeHtml=value=>{return String(value!==null&&value!==void 0?value:'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,''');};export const getRolePagePath=role=>{if(role==='admin')return'/admin';if(role==='doctor')return'/doctor';if(role==='patient')return'/patient';return'/login';};export const formatDate=dateString=>{if(!dateString)return'N/A';const date=new Date(dateString);return date.toLocaleDateString();};export const formatTime=timeString=>{if(!timeString)return'N/A';return timeString;};
